title: Vanilla Premium Plus
description: A mod pack aimed at keeping the vanilla feel while also re-balancing the game, adding quality of life changes and highly requested features
body:
Hello all! Are you bored of the base game? Are you frustrated with broken mechanics, pointless features and a lack of polish that feels oh so familiar with the modern minecraft experience? These popular complains are very common in the minecraft community and is what I aim to address with this mod pack.

This mod pack aims to capture the feel of vanilla while also re balancing mechanics such as:
- beds
- exploration
- horses
- the end
- random structures.
- Hunger
- beds
- and other things I cant remember
  
It also improves on:
- end generation
- over world generation
- random structures
- the dragon boss fight
- combat
- inventory management
- World generation
- Maps
- Copper
- quality of life
- food/ cooking
- and other things I cant remember
  
Lastly it adds highly requested features like:
- Vertical slabs
- more half slabs. Two different half slabs can occupy the same block!
- Seasons
- Better survival mechanics like temperature and and nutrition
- Bundles
- warden tools
- new ships and boats
- More weapon and tool progression and variety
- more foods and crops
- and other things I cant remember
  
I hope y'all like it and suggestions are welcomed!
